items.line_en: Hey everyone, welcome to a perfect winter morning.

coach.say: Hey everyone, welcome to a perfect winter morning.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey everyone, / welcome to a perfect winter morning.

items.line_en: Today, I'm not alone. Meet my best friend Mia. We're heading to the slopes.

coach.say: Today, I'm not alone. Meet my best friend Mia. We're heading to the slopes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Today, / I'm not alone. / Meet my best friend Mia. / We're heading to the slopes.

items.line_en: Mia, are you ready for the challenge? It's going to be legendary.

coach.say: Mia, are you ready for the challenge? It's going to be legendary.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Mia, / are you ready for the challenge? / It's going to be legendary.

items.line_en: I'm so pumped, Sophia.

coach.say: I'm so pumped, Sophia.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm so pumped, / Sophia.

items.line_en: But wait, I think my head is too big for this helmet.

coach.say: But wait, I think my head is too big for this helmet.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But wait, / I think my head is too big for this helmet.

items.line_en: Don't worry, I've got you. Let me help you strap it in. There you go.

coach.say: Don't worry, I've got you. Let me help you strap it in. There you go.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't worry, / I've got you. / Let me help you strap it in. / There you go.

items.line_en: We're heading out to the peak.

coach.say: We're heading out to the peak.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We're heading out to the peak.

items.line_en: In English, when you start a journey, you set off.

coach.say: In English, when you start a journey, you set off.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In English, / when you start a journey, / you set off.

items.line_en: It's a big credit today, but we'll manage to get through the line quickly.

coach.say: It's a big credit today, but we'll manage to get through the line quickly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's a big credit today, / but we'll manage to get through the line quickly.

items.line_en: Ready to leave the world below? Let's go up.

coach.say: Ready to leave the world below? Let's go up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ready to leave the world below? / Let's go up.

items.line_en: Okay, okay, I'm coming. This is really happening.

coach.say: Okay, okay, I'm coming. This is really happening.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / okay, / I'm coming. / This is really happening.

items.line_en: And we are airborne. Hold on tight, Mia.

coach.say: And we are airborne. Hold on tight, Mia.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And we are airborne. / Hold on tight, / Mia.

items.line_en: Look at that, Mia. The view is absolutely breathtaking, isn't it?

coach.say: Look at that, Mia. The view is absolutely breathtaking, isn't it?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Look at that, / Mia. / The view is absolutely breathtaking, / isn't it?

items.line_en: It really is, but honestly, I'm a bit on edge. Look how high we are.

coach.say: It really is, but honestly, I'm a bit on edge. Look how high we are.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It really is, / but honestly, / I'm a bit on edge. / Look how high we are.

items.line_en: Don't be nervous. Notice the phrase on edge. It means to feel anxious.

coach.say: Don't be nervous. Notice the phrase on edge. It means to feel anxious.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't be nervous. / Notice the phrase on edge. / It means to feel anxious.

items.line_en: Just take a deep breath and soak in the scenery. We're going to have a blast.

coach.say: Just take a deep breath and soak in the scenery. We're going to have a blast.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Just take a deep breath and soak in the scenery. / We're going to have a blast.

items.line_en: In winter, the mountains have the special stillness. It's quiet and powerful.

coach.say: In winter, the mountains have the special stillness. It's quiet and powerful.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In winter, / the mountains have the special stillness. / It's quiet and powerful.

items.line_en: Okay, okay, I'm ready. I can do this. Just don't let me fall right here.

coach.say: Okay, okay, I'm ready. I can do this. Just don't let me fall right here.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, okay, / I'm ready. I can do this. Just don't let me fall right here.

items.line_en: Great landing, Mia. You see, you're a natural.

coach.say: Great landing, Mia. You see, you're a natural.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great landing, / Mia. / You see, / you're a natural.

items.line_en: The air is so crisp here. It's time to face the slope.

coach.say: The air is so crisp here. It's time to face the slope.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The air is so crisp here. / It's time to face the slope.

items.line_en: To face something, it means to look at a challenge directly.

coach.say: To face something, it means to look at a challenge directly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: To face something, / it means to look at a challenge directly.

items.line_en: Here we go.

coach.say: Here we go.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Here we go.

items.line_en: Let's show this mountain what we've got.

coach.say: Let's show this mountain what we've got.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's show this mountain what we've got.

items.line_en: And we're off. We're picking up speed now.

coach.say: And we're off. We're picking up speed now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And we're off. / We're picking up speed now.

items.line_en: To pick up speed means to go faster.

coach.say: To pick up speed means to go faster.
coach.hint: Chunk it: To pick up speed means to go faster.

items.line_en: Feel the rhythm. It's all about balance and concentration.

coach.say: Feel the rhythm. It's all about balance and concentration.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Feel the rhythm. / It's all about balance and concentration.

items.line_en: Look at Mia. She is keeping up with me perfectly.

coach.say: Look at Mia. She is keeping up with me perfectly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Look at Mia. / She is keeping up with me perfectly.

items.line_en: Don't forget to lean into the turns, Mia. Trust your board.

coach.say: Don't forget to lean into the turns, Mia. Trust your board.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't forget to lean into the turns, / Mia. / Trust your board.

items.line_en: I'm getting the hang of it. This is amazing.

coach.say: I'm getting the hang of it. This is amazing.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm getting the hang of it. / This is amazing.

items.line_en: Having fun is the best way to learn. Let's add some style.

coach.say: Having fun is the best way to learn. Let's add some style.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Having fun is the best way to learn. / Let's add some style.

items.line_en: Winter sports are great for your health, but better for your soul.

coach.say: Winter sports are great for your health, but better for your soul.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Winter sports are great for your health, / but better for your soul.

items.line_en: Hey, nature is trying to fight me.

coach.say: Hey, nature is trying to fight me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey, / nature is trying to fight me.

items.line_en: That's just a mountain's way of saying hello.

coach.say: That's just a mountain's way of saying hello.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's just a mountain's way of saying hello.

items.line_en: Watch this. I'm going to take a little leap.

coach.say: Watch this. I'm going to take a little leap.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Watch this. / I'm going to take a little leap.

items.line_en: Three, two, one. Gravity never heard of it.

coach.say: Three, two, one. Gravity never heard of it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Three, / two, / one. / Gravity never heard of it.

items.line_en: Ooh, your turn, Mia. Just a small hop.

coach.say: Ooh, your turn, Mia. Just a small hop.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ooh, / your turn, / Mia. / Just a small hop.

items.line_en: Oh my god, oh my god, here I go.

coach.say: Oh my god, oh my god, here I go.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh my god, / oh my god, / here I go.

items.line_en: Wait, this is not how it looked in the video.

coach.say: Wait, this is not how it looked in the video.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wait, / this is not how it looked in the video.

items.line_en: Mia, where are you? All I see is a pair of boots.

coach.say: Mia, where are you? All I see is a pair of boots.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Mia, / where are you? / All I see is a pair of boots.

items.line_en: I think I found some extra snow for you.

coach.say: I think I found some extra snow for you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I think I found some extra snow for you.

items.line_en: Are you okay? No broken bones? Just broken pride?

coach.say: Are you okay? No broken bones? Just broken pride?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Are you okay? / No broken bones? / Just broken pride?

items.line_en: I totally messed up that landing. I looked like a flying potato.

coach.say: I totally messed up that landing. I looked like a flying potato.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I totally messed up that landing. / I looked like a flying potato.

items.line_en: Give me your hand. Let me pull you up. You were brave.

coach.say: Give me your hand. Let me pull you up. You were brave.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Give me your hand. / Let me pull you up. / You were brave.

items.line_en: Remember this verb to mess up. We all do it, especially on a snowboard.

coach.say: Remember this verb to mess up. We all do it, especially on a snowboard.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Remember this verb to mess up. / We all do it, / especially on a snowboard.

items.line_en: Don't let it get you down. Just shake it off. We have half the mountain left.

coach.say: Don't let it get you down. Just shake it off. We have half the mountain left.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't let it get you down. / Just shake it off. / We have half the mountain left.

items.line_en: You're right. Let's finish this. I want to try that turn again.

coach.say: You're right. Let's finish this. I want to try that turn again.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You're right. / Let's finish this. / I want to try that turn again.

items.line_en: By the end of the day, we were completely worn out, exhausted, but happy.

coach.say: By the end of the day, we were completely worn out, exhausted, but happy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: By the end of the day, / we were completely worn out, / exhausted, / but happy.

items.line_en: Oh, smell that, cinnamon and wood fire. This is heaven.

coach.say: Oh, smell that, cinnamon and wood fire. This is heaven.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / smell that, / cinnamon and wood fire. / This is heaven.

items.line_en: Nothing beats this ritual. It's the best way to wind down.

coach.say: Nothing beats this ritual. It's the best way to wind down.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Nothing beats this ritual. / It's the best way to wind down.

items.line_en: Thanks for backing me up today, Sophia. I wouldn't have finished that run without you.

coach.say: Thanks for backing me up today, Sophia. I wouldn't have finished that run without you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks for backing me up today, / Sophia. / I wouldn't have finished that run without you.

items.line_en: Learning English is like snowboarding. You might wipe out, but you have to shake it off.

coach.say: Learning English is like snowboarding. You might wipe out, but you have to shake it off.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Learning English is like snowboarding. / You might wipe out, / but you have to shake it off.

items.line_en: Your task, tell me about a time you messed up while learning something. How did you feel?

coach.say: Your task, tell me about a time you messed up while learning something. How did you feel?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Your task, / tell me about a time you messed up while learning something. / How did you feel?

items.line_en: Stay cozy, stay brave, and see you next time.

coach.say: Stay cozy, stay brave, and see you next time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Stay cozy, / stay brave, / and see you next time.

items.line_en: Bye.

coach.say: Bye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Bye.
